assertions.assertion: Uses GrantTypes.Code (not Implicit) as the grant type
assertions.rationale: AllowedGrantTypes = GrantTypes.Code is explicitly set. Response also warns against using implicit flow.

assertions.assertion: Sets RequireClientSecret = false since it is a public SPA client
assertions.rationale: RequireClientSecret = false is explicitly set with a comment explaining SPAs are public clients.
AllowedCorsOrigins = { "https://spa.myapp.com" } is present in the client definition.

assertions.assertion: Sets AllowOfflineAccess = true to enable refresh tokens
assertions.rationale: AllowOfflineAccess = true is explicitly set with a comment about enabling refresh tokens.
